{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Kuddy Cosmetics is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s oldest and most trusted names in beauty. From our stores across Lagos, we distribute and retail authentic makeup, skincare, and haircare and wellness products, carrying leading international and Nigerian brands as well as our own line.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Business Development Manager

Job Location: Tradefair, Ojo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Reports To: Chairman and COO
Working Days: Monday - Friday

Summary


	The Sales &amp; Business Development Manager is responsible for driving revenue growth, expanding market presence, and strengthening customer relationships across all sales channels.
	The successful candidate will lead the development and execution of sales strategies, identify new business opportunities, manage key customer relationships, and ensure the achievement of sales target and profitability objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Sales Strategy &amp; Revenue Growth: Take full ownership of company sales targets by developing and executing sales strategies that drive revenue growth, increase market share, and support the achievement of organizational goals.
	Sales Team Leadership &amp; Performance Management: Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to achieve individual and collective performance goals. Establish clear expectations, monitor productivity, provide regular feedback, and foster a high-performance culture.
	Branch Performance Management: Conduct regular branch visits to assess sales activities, customer engagement, operational effectiveness, and adherence to company standards.
	Business Development &amp; Market Expansion: Identify and pursue new business opportunities, strategic partnerships, and distribution channels that contribute to business growth. Build and maintain strong relationships with key customers, distributors, and other stakeholders while continuously exploring opportunities to expand the company&#39;s market presence.
	Product Performance &amp; Sales Optimization: Monitor product sales trends and take proactive steps to improve product performance across all locations. Identify slow-moving products and develop practical sales and promotional activities that increase product visibility, accelerate sales, and optimize inventory movement.
	Customer Relationship Management: Strengthen customer acquisition, retention, and loyalty by ensuring exceptional customer experiences across all touchpoints.
	Brand Activation &amp; Market Presence: Actively support and participate in brand activations, promotional events, trade shows, community engagements, product launches, and customer-focused initiatives that enhance brand visibility and generate sales opportunities.
	Reporting &amp; Business Intelligence: Analyze sales performance, market trends, customer insights, and competitor activities to support informed decision-making. Prepare and present periodic sales and business development reports, highlighting performance results, and recommendations that support continuous growth.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Marketing, Operations, Finance, Inventory, Customer Service, and Human Resources teams to ensure alignment of business objectives and successful execution of growth initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 6 years of experience in Sales, Business Development, Commercial Management, or a related role.
	Experience within the Cosmetics, Beauty, Retail, FMCG, or Consumer Goods industry is highly desired.
	Demonstrated track record of achieving sales and business growth targets.
	Interested candidate should stay within close proximity to Trade Fair, Ojo as this is a full-time On-site role and not hybrid or remote.


Salary
N500,000 - N650,000 per month + transport float+ performance bonus (proposed).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV to: careers@kuddycosmetics.com and copy: moses@kuddycosmetics.com using the Job Position and their Location (E.g. Sales &amp; Business Development Manager - Festac) as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Kuddy Cosmetics"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "value": "200341"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "minValue": 400000,
      "maxValue": 600000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Sales & Business Development Manager Job at Kuddy Cosmetics




        
    

        
        Kuddy Cosmetics is one of Nigeria’s oldest and most trusted names in beauty. From our stores across Lagos, we distribute and retail authentic makeup, skincare, and haircare and wellness products, carrying leading international and Nigerian brands as well as our own line.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Business Development Manager

Job Location: Tradefair, Ojo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Reports To: Chairman and COO
Working Days: Monday - Friday

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Sales & Business Development Manager is responsible for driving revenue growth, expanding market presence, and strengthening customer relationships across all sales channels.
	The successful candidate will lead the development and execution of sales strategies, identify new business opportunities, manage key customer relationships, and ensure the achievement of sales target and profitability objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Sales Strategy & Revenue Growth: Take full ownership of company sales targets by developing and executing sales strategies that drive revenue growth, increase market share, and support the achievement of organizational goals.
	Sales Team Leadership & Performance Management: Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to achieve individual and collective performance goals. Establish clear expectations, monitor productivity, provide regular feedback, and foster a high-performance culture.
	Branch Performance Management: Conduct regular branch visits to assess sales activities, customer engagement, operational effectiveness, and adherence to company standards.
	Business Development & Market Expansion: Identify and pursue new business opportunities, strategic partnerships, and distribution channels that contribute to business growth. Build and maintain strong relationships with key customers, distributors, and other stakeholders while continuously exploring opportunities to expand the company's market presence.
	Product Performance & Sales Optimization: Monitor product sales trends and take proactive steps to improve product performance across all locations. Identify slow-moving products and develop practical sales and promotional activities that increase product visibility, accelerate sales, and optimize inventory movement.
	Customer Relationship Management: Strengthen customer acquisition, retention, and loyalty by ensuring exceptional customer experiences across all touchpoints.
	Brand Activation & Market Presence: Actively support and participate in brand activations, promotional events, trade shows, community engagements, product launches, and customer-focused initiatives that enhance brand visibility and generate sales opportunities.
	Reporting & Business Intelligence: Analyze sales performance, market trends, customer insights, and competitor activities to support informed decision-making. Prepare and present periodic sales and business development reports, highlighting performance results, and recommendations that support continuous growth.
	Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Marketing, Operations, Finance, Inventory, Customer Service, and Human Resources teams to ensure alignment of business objectives and successful execution of growth initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Economics, Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 6 years of experience in Sales, Business Development, Commercial Management, or a related role.
	Experience within the Cosmetics, Beauty, Retail, FMCG, or Consumer Goods industry is highly desired.
	Demonstrated track record of achieving sales and business growth targets.
	Interested candidate should stay within close proximity to Trade Fair, Ojo as this is a full-time On-site role and not hybrid or remote.


Salary
N500,000 - N650,000 per month + transport float+ performance bonus (proposed).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV to: [email protected] and copy: [email protected] using the Job Position and their Location (E.g. Sales & Business Development Manager - Festac) as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer / Sales Representative",
  "description": "Packs&quot;n&quot;balloons operates in the party supply, event planning, and retail industry in Lekki, Lagos. They specialize in selling party decorations, helium balloons, and related supplies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer / Sales Representative
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a Customer / Sales Representative who will attend to customers, manage inquiries, and support daily sales activities.
	The role requires someone friendly, organized, and customer-focused.


Responsibilities


	Attend to walk-in and online customers politely and professionally
	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in person
	Assist customers with product selection and order processing
	Maintain accurate records of sales and customer interactions
	Support daily store operations and teamwork.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification: SSCE
	Previous experience in a similar customer service or sales role is an added advantage.


Other Requirements:


	Female applicants only
	Minimum age: 25 years
	Must be located in or close to Lekki Phase 1
	No accommodation provided.


Skills:


	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Customer-friendly attitude
	Ability to work well in a team
	Basic computer knowledge
	Good time management and attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and passport photograph to: packsnballons@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer / Sales Representative Job at Packs"n"Balloons




        
    

        
        Packs"n"balloons operates in the party supply, event planning, and retail industry in Lekki, Lagos. They specialize in selling party decorations, helium balloons, and related supplies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer / Sales Representative
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for a Customer / Sales Representative who will attend to customers, manage inquiries, and support daily sales activities.
	The role requires someone friendly, organized, and customer-focused.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Attend to walk-in and online customers politely and professionally
	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in person
	Assist customers with product selection and order processing
	Maintain accurate records of sales and customer interactions
	Support daily store operations and teamwork.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification: SSCE
	Previous experience in a similar customer service or sales role is an added advantage.


Other Requirements:


	Female applicants only
	Minimum age: 25 years
	Must be located in or close to Lekki Phase 1
	No accommodation provided.


Skills:


	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Customer-friendly attitude
	Ability to work well in a team
	Basic computer knowledge
	Good time management and attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and passport photograph to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Marketing Associate",
  "description": "Kuddy Cosmetics is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s oldest and most trusted names in beauty. From our stores across Lagos, we distribute and retail authentic makeup, skincare, and haircare products, carrying leading international and Nigerian brands as well as our own line. Customers come to Kuddy because they know they are getting the original product at the right price, and that reputation is what this role helps protect and grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Locations: Festac, Oshodi, Lekki and Surulere - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-Time (fully on-site)
Working Days: Monday - Friday

About the Role


	We are hiring Marketing Associates to own marketing for an assigned cluster of our stores, on the ground and online. You will be the face of our brand in your territory: running promotions and activations, keeping our products beautifully presented, partnering with our content team, and bringing back the customer and market insight that shapes what we do next.
	You will spend most of your week in stores, so you must live within easy reach of your assigned cluster.


What You Will Do


	Own your territory: Visit your branches regularly, build strong relationships with branch teams, and spot opportunities and gaps before anyone asks.
	Run promotions and activations: Plan and execute in-store promotions, seasonal campaigns, product sampling, and makeup demo days. Make sure banners, flyers, shelf talkers, and other campaign materials are produced, delivered, and displayed correctly and on time.
	Keep our products visible and irresistible: Monitor displays, shelf presentation, and branding standards across your stores. Flag slow movers that need repositioning or a promotional push, and make sure new launches get prime placement and attention.
	Take the brand into the community: Represent Kuddy at local events, markets, salons, and beauty schools in your territory. Build relationships with makeup artists and beauty professionals who can champion our products, and find local partnership opportunities that bring new customers through our doors.
	Co-create content and campaign ideas: Work closely with our content creators, designers, and photographers. Spot the moments worth capturing in your stores, from a new launch to a loyal customer&rsquo;s story, line up products and people for shoots, and bring your own ideas for campaigns, promos, and content to the table. We expect you to contribute ideas, not just execute instructions.
	Support our digital channels: Assist with social media, email, and WhatsApp marketing, help push your territory&rsquo;s promos online, and keep brand messaging consistent between our shelves and our screens.
	Bring back insight: Track what is selling and what is sitting, gather customer feedback, watch competitor pricing and promotions in your area, and share what you learn so the team plans with real information.


Who Fits


	Degree in a related field.
	1 - 3 years in marketing, retail, field marketing, digital marketing, or brand activation.
	Organized, proactive, and strong on follow-through
	Comfortable on the move between stores and talking directly with customers
	Full of ideas and confident enough to share them
	Good eye for product presentation, beauty trends, and what makes a display sell
	Working knowledge of social media and basic digital marketing tools
	Genuine passion for makeup, beauty, and retail


Salary
N200,000- N250,000 monthly, depending on experience plus transport float

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV to: careers@kuddycosmetics.com using the Job Position and their location (E.g. Marketing Associate - Okota.).

Note


	This is not a remote or hybrid role.
	Applications without a location in the subject will not be reviewed.
	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.

Marketing Associate Job at Kuddy Cosmetics




        
    

        
        Kuddy Cosmetics is one of Nigeria’s oldest and most trusted names in beauty. From our stores across Lagos, we distribute and retail authentic makeup, skincare, and haircare products, carrying leading international and Nigerian brands as well as our own line. Customers come to Kuddy because they know they are getting the original product at the right price, and that reputation is what this role helps protect and grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Associate

Job Locations: Festac, Oshodi, Lekki and Surulere - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-Time (fully on-site)
Working Days: Monday - Friday

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring Marketing Associates to own marketing for an assigned cluster of our stores, on the ground and online. You will be the face of our brand in your territory: running promotions and activations, keeping our products beautifully presented, partnering with our content team, and bringing back the customer and market insight that shapes what we do next.
	You will spend most of your week in stores, so you must live within easy reach of your assigned cluster.


What You Will Do


	Own your territory: Visit your branches regularly, build strong relationships with branch teams, and spot opportunities and gaps before anyone asks.
	Run promotions and activations: Plan and execute in-store promotions, seasonal campaigns, product sampling, and makeup demo days. Make sure banners, flyers, shelf talkers, and other campaign materials are produced, delivered, and displayed correctly and on time.
	Keep our products visible and irresistible: Monitor displays, shelf presentation, and branding standards across your stores. Flag slow movers that need repositioning or a promotional push, and make sure new launches get prime placement and attention.
	Take the brand into the community: Represent Kuddy at local events, markets, salons, and beauty schools in your territory. Build relationships with makeup artists and beauty professionals who can champion our products, and find local partnership opportunities that bring new customers through our doors.
	Co-create content and campaign ideas: Work closely with our content creators, designers, and photographers. Spot the moments worth capturing in your stores, from a new launch to a loyal customer’s story, line up products and people for shoots, and bring your own ideas for campaigns, promos, and content to the table. We expect you to contribute ideas, not just execute instructions.
	Support our digital channels: Assist with social media, email, and WhatsApp marketing, help push your territory’s promos online, and keep brand messaging consistent between our shelves and our screens.
	Bring back insight: Track what is selling and what is sitting, gather customer feedback, watch competitor pricing and promotions in your area, and share what you learn so the team plans with real information.


Who Fits


	Degree in a related field.
	1 - 3 years in marketing, retail, field marketing, digital marketing, or brand activation.
	Organized, proactive, and strong on follow-through
	Comfortable on the move between stores and talking directly with customers
	Full of ideas and confident enough to share them
	Good eye for product presentation, beauty trends, and what makes a display sell
	Working knowledge of social media and basic digital marketing tools
	Genuine passion for makeup, beauty, and retail


Salary
N200,000- N250,000 monthly, depending on experience plus transport float

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and their location (E.g. Marketing Associate - Okota.).

Note


	This is not a remote or hybrid role.
	Applications without a location in the subject will not be reviewed.
	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Bank Tellers are responsible for handling customer transactions, ensuring accuracy in cash processing, and delivering excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Process customer deposits and withdrawals
	Handle teller transactions efficiently
	Verify customer and transaction details
	Manage and balance cash drawers
	Ensure compliance with banking procedures
	Maintain accuracy and confidentiality


Requirements

	NYSC completion is mandatory
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	Good communication skills
	High attention to detail
	Cash handling or banking experience is an advantage.


Remuneration
N202,000 net monthly salary plus benefits:


	Pension
	HMO
	Leave Allowance
	13th Month Allowance.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage of the recruitment process.",

Bank Teller Job at Kimberly Ryan Limited




        
    

        
        Kimberly Ryan Limited - Our client, Access Bank, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bank Teller

Job Location:  Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	Bank Tellers are responsible for handling customer transactions, ensuring accuracy in cash processing, and delivering excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Process customer deposits and withdrawals
	Handle teller transactions efficiently
	Verify customer and transaction details
	Manage and balance cash drawers
	Ensure compliance with banking procedures
	Maintain accuracy and confidentiality


Requirements


	Degree in Accounting, Banking & Finance, or related field (advantage)
	NYSC completion is mandatory
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	Good communication skills
	High attention to detail
	Cash handling or banking experience is an advantage.


Remuneration
N202,000 net monthly salary plus benefits:


	Pension
	HMO
	Leave Allowance
	13th Month Allowance.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage of the recruitment process.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "RCCG is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin / Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The Admin / Social Media Manager will support the smooth running of church administration and digital communications by managing member engagement, first-timer follow-up, and all church social media platforms.
	The role is vital in ensuring effective communication, outreach, and a welcoming experience for new and existing members.


Key Responsibilities
First Timer Engagement &amp; Follow-up:


	Send welcome emails to first-time visitors promptly.
	Contact first timers via email, phone, or WhatsApp to appreciate their visit.
	Maintain and update the First Timer database.
	Ensure proper follow-up and integration of new members into church activities.


Church Administration:


	Manage church communication with members via email and WhatsApp messages.
	Maintain accurate records of church members and visitors.
	Provide administrative support for church programs and events.
	Assist with coordination of church services, meetings, and special events.
	Ensure timely dissemination of announcements and information to members.


Social Media Management:


	Manage all church social media platforms, including:
	
		Facebook
		Instagram
		YouTube
		WhatsApp
		TikTok (if applicable)
	
	
	Create and schedule posts for services, programs, and events.
	Respond to messages and enquiries received through social media platforms.
	Monitor engagement and ensure consistent online presence.
	Promote church programs and community outreach activities.


Design &amp; Content Creation:


	Prepare and design flyers, announcements, and promotional materials for church programs and events.
	Support the development of digital content, including:
	
		Graphics
		Short videos
		Event promotions
	
	
	Ensure all materials reflect RCCG values and branding standards.


Person Specification
Essential Requirements
Faith &amp; Character:


	Must be a committed Christian with a good testimony.
	Must demonstrate integrity, reliability, and a servant-hearted attitude.
	Must be willing to support the mission and vision of the church.


Skills &amp; Experience:


	Good communication skills (written and verbal).
	Ability to manage email, WhatsApp, and social media platforms effectively.
	Basic graphic design skills (e.g., Canva).
	Strong organisational and administrative skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Good attention to detail.


Technical Skills:


	Social media management
	Email communication
	Microsoft Office / Google Workspace
	Basic design tools (e.g., Canva)
	WhatsApp broadcast and messaging management


Preferred Requirements:


	Must be a member of RCCG (preferred).
	Previous experience in church administration or social media management.
	Experience managing church or ministry communications.
	Ability to attend church services and events regularly.
	Knowledge of church operations and culture.


Key Personal Qualities:


	Spiritually mature and dependable
	Friendly and approachable
	Organized and proactive
	Creative and detail-oriented
	Team player
	Confidential and trustworthy


Working Hours (Example):


	Sunday Services
	Midweek Services
	Occasional special programs or events
	(Flexible schedule may be required).


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.
